sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald and Goldman Sachs Lift Western Digital (WDC) Price Targets
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald and Goldman Sachs have raised their price targets for Western Digital (WDC) following company updates and an Innovation Day event. Cantor Fitzgerald increased its target to $420, citing significantly better growth and profitability projections, while Goldman Sachs raised its target to $250 after the company confirmed its HAMR product rollout and updated long-term guidance. Both firms adjusted earnings per share estimates for the company.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley, Deutsche Bank Raise Micron (MU) Price Targets
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley and Deutsche Bank have both raised their price targets for Micron Technology (MU) due to increasing DRAM prices, supply shortages, and strong demand in the memory market, particularly for High Bandwidth Memory (HBM). Morgan Stanley increased its target to $450, while Deutsche Bank raised its target to $500, citing tight supply and improving market trends. Deutsche Bank also increased its calendar year 2026 earnings per share estimate for Micron to $46.50.

feed.title: Keysight (KEYS) Announces SOS Enterprise Software, Analysts Raise Price Targets
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies (NYSE: KEYS) announced SOS Enterprise, an advanced engineering data management platform designed to automate data governance and traceability, preparing organizations for AI adoption. This new solution builds on its SOS Core software to create a single system of record for fragmented design and information. In related news, Baird and Goldman Sachs raised their price targets for Keysight, citing strength in AI, data center markets, and strong demand.

feed.title: Western Asset Emerging Markets Debt Fund Inc. (NYSE:EMD) Short Interest Up 30.2% in January
feed.summary: Short interest in Western Asset Emerging Markets Debt Fund Inc. (NYSE:EMD) increased by 30.2% in January, reaching 92,757 shares. The fund also declared a monthly dividend of $0.095 per share, representing an annualized yield of about 10.1%. Institutional investors hold approximately 33.05% of the stock, with Morgan Stanley being the largest holder.

feed.title: Bio-Techne's Ella Platform Achieves CE-IVD Marking Expanding Access to Rapid, Cartridge?Based Immunoassays for European Clinical Laboratories
feed.summary: Bio-Techne's Ella immunoassay platform has received CE-IVD marking, making it available for sale in the European Union. This certification allows European clinical laboratories to use Ella for in-house test development, clinical trials, and translational activities, streamlining workflows and supporting timely decision-making. The Ella system provides rapid, reproducible biomarker results in under 90 minutes, enhancing precision diagnostics and patient outcomes.

feed.title: Analysts Have Made A Financial Statement On Motorola Solutions, Inc.'s (NYSE:MSI) Annual Report
feed.summary: Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI) recently released its annual results, showing revenues of US$12 billion and EPS of US$12.75, which were in line with analyst expectations and led to a 9.3% stock gain. Following these results, analysts have modestly increased their earnings per share estimates for 2026 from US$13.42 to US$13.76, while revenue forecasts and the consensus price target of US$497 remain largely unchanged. The company's projected revenue growth of 8.7% for 2026 aligns with its historical performance but is expected to be slower than the broader industry.

feed.title: ATIF Holdings Limited Announces Strategic Diversification to Bitcoin Business
feed.summary: ATIF Holdings Limited has announced a five-year strategic plan to diversify its business into Bitcoin. The company aims to acquire 1,000 BTC through direct purchases and mining operations, with a focus on establishing energy-efficient mining facilities in West Texas due to its favorable regulatory environment and cost-effective energy resources. This move is intended to position Bitcoin as a key strategic asset for growth and diversification for ATIF Holdings.

feed.title: UBS Downgrades International Paper Company (IP) on Ongoing Cost Pressures
feed.summary: UBS has downgraded International Paper Company (IP) to Neutral from Buy and reduced its price target to $44 from $51, citing expected continued estimate pressure in 2026 and 2027 due to ongoing transformation costs and cost-saving initiatives. The firm noted a below-consensus first-quarter outlook, suggesting earnings will be weighted towards the latter half of the year. Despite near-term pressures from restructuring, International Paper aims for $5 billion in EBITDA by 2027 through operational improvements and cost initiatives, presenting a structured path to profitability.

feed.title: UBS Downgrades International Paper Company (IP) on Ongoing Cost Pressures

Despite near-term earnings pressure from restructuring, the company aims for $5 billion in EBITDA by 2027 through operational improvements and cost savings. International Paper is highlighted as an attractive cyclical recovery stock due to its scale and clear multi-year margin expansion targets.
